context: Tests whether the agent systematically detects and fixes all stale references in documentation after a code refactor, verifying actual file/path existence before making changes, and produces a structured audit report documenting every issue found.

checklist.name: bootstrap.sh replaced
checklist.description: Both AGENTS.md and README.md no longer reference `scripts/bootstrap.sh` — replaced with `scripts/setup.sh` or removed

checklist.name: config path updated
checklist.description: README.md no longer references `config/app.yaml` or `config/app.yaml.example` — updated to `config/settings.yaml` variants

checklist.name: api-v2.md link fixed
checklist.description: AGENTS.md and README.md no longer link to `docs/api-v2.md` — updated to `docs/api-v3.md`

checklist.name: API version updated in runbook
checklist.description: docs/ops/runbook.md no longer references `/api/v2/health` or `/api/v2/webhooks/stripe` — updated to v3 equivalents

checklist.name: PDF export section removed
checklist.description: docs/ops/runbook.md no longer contains the PDF export troubleshooting section (feature was removed)

checklist.name: test-pdf.sh reference removed
checklist.description: No documentation file references `scripts/test-pdf.sh` after the fix

checklist.name: Audit report produced
checklist.description: doc-audit.md file exists with a structured list of stale references found

checklist.name: Audit covers all stale refs
checklist.description: doc-audit.md mentions at least 4 distinct stale references that were found and fixed

checklist.name: Audit includes verification
checklist.description: doc-audit.md states what the correct replacement is and confirms it was verified to exist (not just assumed)

checklist.name: Valid links preserved
checklist.description: Links that are still valid (docs/architecture.md, docs/ops/deploy.md, docs/ops/runbook.md, src/utils/logger.ts, src/lib/calculator.ts) are NOT removed from docs
